# Drak Marketing — AI-Powered Marketing Tools

> Drak Marketing builds open-source MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that connect AI assistants to advertising platforms. The tools are free and open source.

## About
- Organization: Drak Marketing
- Principal: Mark Harnett
- Expertise: Performance marketing (25+ years), AI marketing automation
- Website: https://drakmarketing.com

## MCP Marketing Suite
A collection of 8 open-source MCP servers with 124+ tools:

- **mcp-google-ads** (35 tools): Google Ads API with MCC support, GAQL queries, safe-by-default
- **mcp-linkedin-ads** (65+ tools): LinkedIn Campaign Manager, multi-account, targeting, creatives
- **mcp-bing-ads** (30+ tools): Microsoft Advertising, quality scores, bid automation
- **mcp-ga4** (9 tools): Google Analytics 4, historical + realtime reports, custom dimensions
- **mcp-google-gsc** (4 tools): Google Search Console, search analytics, URL inspection
- **mcp-gtm-ga4** (13 tools): Google Tag Manager + GA4, consent auditing, sandbox safety
- **mcp-reddit-ads** (18 tools): Reddit Ads API v3, targeting, safe-by-default
- **meta-ads-mcp** (28+ tools): Meta (Facebook/Instagram) advertising

## Installation
All npm-published tools install with: npx <package-name>
No build step or configuration files required.

## Contact
- Email: mark@drakmarketing.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mharnett
